latin: Novus praefectus oppidi in equo advenit. oppidani obstupuerunt. unus dixit: 'sed praefectum alium exspectabamus.' praefectus, nihil turbatus, stellam suam ostendit.

questions.prompt: How did the townspeople react to the new sheriff?

translation: The new sheriff of the town arrived on horseback. The townspeople were stunned. One said: 'But we expected a different sheriff.' The sheriff, not at all bothered, showed his star.
